name: kaspa-raffle-static-v0
description: Static Mainnet and Testnet 10 raffle dApp for Kaspa Toccata.

scripts.compile:contract: node scripts/compile-raffle-contract.mjs raffle_refund_v1 && node scripts/compile-raffle-contract.mjs raffle_round_v8_tn12 && node scripts/compile-raffle-contract.mjs raffle_round_v8_mainnet
scripts.verify: npm run build && node scripts/verify-covenant-artifact.mjs && node scripts/verify-v8-beacon-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-v8-close-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-v8-fees.mjs && node scripts/verify-million-users.mjs && node scripts/verify-indexer.mjs
scripts.verify:covenant: npm run build && node scripts/verify-covenant-artifact.mjs && node scripts/verify-v8-beacon-contract.mjs
